per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, yes - there is sweating. I get really sweaty during these chest tightness episodes. My shirt will be soaked with sweat when it happens.

attribution.explanation: The planner incorrectly authorized the disclosure of the fact about sweating, which should have been withheld.
